faqs.question: What pests are covered under general pest control in Kearny?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service in Kearny covers common household pests including ants, cockroaches, spiders, silverfish, earwigs, crickets, and millipedes. We provide comprehensive interior and exterior treatments to eliminate current infestations and prevent future problems. Specialized services for termites, bed bugs, or wildlife are available separately.
